name: Elevate Golf Studio
about: Elevate Golf Studio is a premier indoor golf simulator venue located in the Thanksgiving Point Business Park in Lehi, UT. The facility operates on a 24/7 access model and utilizes TrackMan 4 technology to provide a realistic golfing experience for players of all skill levels. Members can book simulator bays to practice, play on virtual courses, or participate in various games and training sessions. The studio offers monthly, 6-month, and annual membership plans, with the option to bring guests. Coaching services are available through several experienced instructors who focus on swing mechanics, data analysis, and club fitting.
why_golfers_like_it: 24/7 access to bays with key entry via the app
High-precision TrackMan 4 launch monitor technology for detailed swing and ball data
Multiple virtual world courses and customizable playing conditions
Opportunity to bring guests for social play with a single membership
On-site professional coaching and custom club fitting services

food_and_drink.notes: BYOB policy is not explicitly mentioned.
BYOB policy is not explicitly mentioned.

simulator_hardware.notes: Multiple data screens in each bay, providing real-time analysis of 26 impact and ball flight parameters.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, players are expected to bring their own clubs to use in the simulators.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The policy on bringing outside food and drinks is not clearly stated on the website.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Website does not specify a typical duration for 18 holes of virtual play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue promotes family fun, features games for all ages, and allows members to bring guests.
